name: Matzah Rella Lasagna
recipeIngredient: Salt, pepper, oregano, basil to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the matzah squares in very hot water for about 30 seconds, then drain.
2. Beat the Egg Beaters and seasonings together.
3. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the softened matzahs.
4. Spread one-third of the tomato sauce on the bottom of a sprayed casserole dish.
5. Place one matzah on top of the sauce, spread with one-third cottage cheese, then one-third mozzarella.
6. Starting with the tomato sauce, make two more layers by adding sauce, cottage cheese, and mozzarella alternately.
7. If there is any egg mixture left after layering, pour it over the top before baking.
8. Bake in a 350°F oven for 45 minutes.
9. Allow to stand for a few minutes before serving.
